text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I was assigned to be a staff member for one of the small-scale fan meet-and-greets held regularly at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I see! So the three of us will be welcoming the fans this time… Is what you're saying.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna get everyone suuuper hyped up☆ Like by putting on a mini live show together!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh, so the venue is the outdoor stage. In that case, feng shui-wise～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …That being said, the previous event crossed my mind. I need to make sure I don't get too nervous and mess up like last time… The more I thought about it—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer. Are you feeling anxious… 
By any chance?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…I understand. 
I feel the exact same way—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Is what I'd normally say, but not this time. I want to try being super confident instead!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It's true that last time we both ended up getting nervous… And things went a bit awry.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So, learning from that—this time, I'll be the one brimming with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: That way, I figured I could share some of my energy with you. … So!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Let's do thiiis～! Yeaah～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
—How was that? 
…Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Buena Vista's feelings spread not only to me, but to everyone else as well—

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what they're gonna do today～ 
I can't wait～!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Heh, it'll just be the same old thing anyway. I come to every one of these, so I know…!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hm!? T-This music is…!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista & Co.
text_block_list.text: Ta-daaa☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Everyone～☆ Thanks for coming today☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The weather and the flow of chi are both perfect today! Enjoy yourselves to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Then let's start with the parade♪ 
Trainer, please release the balloons!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: 『Ooh!』 『Amazing!』 『They're way more fired up than usual～!』 『Heh, not bad…!』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Everything we had prepared together paid off, and the event was a massive success from start to finish!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness… The audience seemed 
really happy.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Thank you so much. To everyone, and to you</size>
<size=38>Thank you so much. To everyone, and to you</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No, no. Please allow me to thank you instead.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Seeing people who worked so hard 
become happy in proportion to their efforts. It's such a wonderful sight—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It gave me such a deep sense of fulfillment. Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It gave me such a deep sense of fulfillment. Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Not at all. The one who is truly kind is—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You, Trainer, who has worked so hard for everyone leading up to today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …Words that could only come from a truly kind person—Touched by Buena Vista's warmth, my heart felt all warm and fuzzy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eh!? Are you okay, Trainer!? 
Did you get something in your eye…!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista's kindness was so blindingly radiant—While it healed me, it also naturally made me want to straighten up and do better.
